/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/dronecan_messages_unittest.cc.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/dronecan/libcanard/canard.c.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/dronecan/dsdlc_generated/src/uavcan.equipment.gnss.Fix2.c.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/dronecan/dsdlc_generated/src/uavcan.equipment.gnss.Fix.c.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/dronecan/dsdlc_generated/src/uavcan.equipment.gnss.Auxiliary.c.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/dronecan/dsdlc_generated/src/uavcan.equipment.power.BatteryInfo.c.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/dronecan/dsdlc_generated/src/uavcan.protocol.NodeStatus.c.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/dronecan/dsdlc_generated/src/uavcan.Timestamp.c.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/dronecan/dsdlc_generated/src/uavcan.equipment.gnss.ECEFPositionVelocity.c.o CMakeFiles/dronecan_messages_unittest.dir/dronecan_messages_unittest_gen/settings_generated.c.o -o dronecan_messages_unittest  ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
